categories.name: THE MAN, THE MYTH, THE LEGEND

questions.clue: Colorful name for a processed oxide of uranium:WEEKLY COAL
Process of increasing the proportion of U-235 compared to U-238:NINTH CREME
A nucleus formed by the radioactive decay of a parent nuclide:HATED RUG
This type of particle can be produced during reactions such as beta decay:TIRE NOUN
The changing of one element into another through a nuclear reaction:MOUNTAIN TARTS

The largest branded marketer of baby apparel in North America, it also owns OshKosh B'gosh
